name: Advanced Line Numbers

releases.author: github-actions[bot]
releases.description:
# Advanced Line Numbers v1.1.0

This release adds the ability to turn off active line highlighting, plus behind-the-scenes hardening and compatibility improvements.

## ✨ What's New

Toggle Active Line Highlighting

You can now fully disable the plugin's active line highlight (both the editor line and the gutter highlight) in one switch. This is ideal if your theme (for example, Minimal) already provides its own full-width active line highlight and you don't want a second highlight layered on top.

- New "Highlight active line" toggle in settings
- New command palette commands: Enable active line highlight / Disable active line highlight
- Covers both the editor line background and the gutter number highlight

Resolves #1, thanks to the community for the request!

## 🔧 Improvements & Under the Hood

- Switched to Obsidian's `createDiv()` API for proper popout-window compatibility
- Updated dependencies to clear security advisories
- Added build provenance attestation to release artifacts for verifiable, tamper-evident builds

## 📋 All Features

Line Number Modes
- Absolute: Standard line numbers (1, 2, 3...)
- Relative: Distance from the current line (great for vim-style navigation)
- Hybrid: Absolute number on the current line, relative on the others

Active Line Highlighting
- Highlight the active line in the editor
- Highlight the active line in the gutter
- Highlight the active line number with a distinct color
- Toggle it all off if your theme handles highlighting itself

Status Bar Integration
- Displays your cursor's position (Ln X, Col Y)

## ⬆️ Updating

Existing users: update from Settings → Community Plugins. Your current settings are preserved, and active line highlighting stays on by default.

## 📦 Installation

From Obsidian Community Plugins
1. Open Settings → Community Plugins
2. Search for "Advanced Line Numbers"
3. Click Install, then Enable

Manual Installation
1. Download main.js, styles.css, and manifest.json from this release
2. Create folder: VaultFolder/.obsidian/plugins/advanced-line-numbers/
3. Copy the downloaded files into the folder
4. Reload Obsidian and enable the plugin in Settings


## 💬 Feedback & Support

- Found a bug? Report it
- Have a feature idea? Request it
- Enjoying the plugin? Leave a star on GitHub! ⭐

## 📄 License

MIT License - see the LICENSE file for details.

releases.author: github-actions[bot]
releases.description:
# Advanced Line Numbers v1.0.0 - Initial Release

I'm excited to release **Advanced Line Numbers**, an Obsidian plugin that enhances your editor with customizable line numbers and active line highlighting!

## Features

### Line Number Modes
- **Absolute** - Standard line numbers (1, 2, 3...)
- **Relative** - Shows distance from current line (perfect for vim-style navigation)
- **Hybrid** - Best of both worlds: absolute number on current line, relative on others

### Active Line Highlighting
- Highlight the active line in the editor
- Highlight the active line in the gutter
- Highlight the active line number with a distinct color

### Status Bar Integration
- Displays your cursor's position (Ln X, Col Y) in the status bar
- Quick reference for navigation and editing

## Installation

### From Obsidian Community Plugins
1. Open Settings → Community Plugins
2. Search for "Advanced Line Numbers"
3. Click Install, then Enable

### Manual Installation
1. Download `main.js`, `styles.css`, and `manifest.json` from this release
2. Create folder: `VaultFolder/.obsidian/plugins/advanced-line-numbers/`
3. Copy the downloaded files into the folder
4. Reload Obsidian and enable the plugin in Settings

## Settings

Configure the plugin to match your workflow:
- **Line Number Mode** - Choose between Absolute, Relative, or Hybrid
- **Display Cursor's Position** - Toggle status bar position display on/off

## Known Issues

None at this time! If you encounter any issues, please [report them here](https://github.com/anamaydev/advanced-line-numbers/issues)

## Feedback & Support

- Found a bug? [Report it](https://github.com/anamaydev/advanced-line-numbers/issues)
- Have a feature idea? [Request it](https://github.com/anamaydev/advanced-line-numbers/issues)
- Enjoying the plugin? Leave a star on GitHub!

## License

MIT License - See LICENSE file for details
